title: MacroMatrix
description: Per-package observed macro combinations mapped to Conan option definitions. The source of truth for all generated conanfile.py options.

combinations.description: All distinct macro combinations observed across files in this package

conanOptions.description: The minimal set of Conan options that covers all observed combinations

coverageNote.description: Optional note explaining any gap between observed combinations and option coverage

minimizationStrategy.description: The strategy used to minimize options from combinations

id.description: Unique identifier for this combination within the package (e.g., 'combo-0')

macros.description: Macro name → value map for this combination

sourceFiles.description: Files in this package that use this macro combination

mappedToOption.description: The Conan option value string this combination maps to (e.g., 'threads=True,debug=False')

type.description: bool: values are [True, False]; enum: any set of string values

values.description: All valid option values. For bool: ['True', 'False'].

defaultValue.description: The default option value (must be in 'values')

macroMapping.description: Maps this option's values to the macro(s) they control

description.description: Human-readable description of what this option controls
